prestazioni: Engine swap to a Cummins B5.9L 6BT turbo-diesel (350hp/800Nm) with a Banks Power Sidewinder turbo kit (GT42R turbo, 4-inch stainless downpipe, and Big Hoss intercooler) paired with a PPE 6-speed manual transmission conversion (replacing the stock ZF 5HP24 automatic) for extreme off-road torque delivery and durability.

Full ARB Old Man Emu BP-51 long-travel suspension system with 2.5-inch remote-reservoir shocks, heavy-duty sway bars, and custom-fabricated 3-link rear suspension with Watts linkage for articulation, paired with Hutchinson beadlock wheels (16x8, -38mm offset) wrapped in 37x12.50R16 BFGoodrich KM3 tires for rock-crawling dominance.

Dual Air-Zenith OB2 compressors with 5-gallon air tanks, ARB twin air lockers (front and rear), and a custom hydraulic steering damper setup (Rancho RS5000X) to handle the extreme articulation and steering feedback under load, with a Warn Zeon 12-S winch (12,000lb capacity) and synthetic rope for recovery.
estetica: Full Ex-Army NATO-spec matte olive drab repaint with Cerakote MC-160 (military-grade ceramic coating) for corrosion resistance, paired with a custom-fabricated steel front bumper (by Mantec 4x4) featuring integrated D-ring mounts and a recessed light bar (Baja Designs Squadron Pro, 50-inch width).

Rear overland setup with a custom aluminum roof rack (by Front Runner Outfitters) supporting a 120W solar panel (Renogy), a 100L water tank (RotopaX), and a James Baroud Evo 2.3 roof tent, with side-mounted jerry can holders (Maxtrax) and a rear swing-out tire carrier (Mantec 4x4) for spare 37-inch tire and dual RotopaX fuel cans.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with Recaro Pole Position bucket seats (cloth upholstery, 4-point harnesses), a custom aluminum dashboard (by Rally Design) housing a Racepak IQ3 digital dash, and a full military-spec wiring harness (by Painless Performance) with waterproof connectors, paired with a custom roll cage (by Safety Devices) integrated with a fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360).
